misc: Loves basketball even more than Marcus, making some fans wonder if he's a real golfer
biography: Pasi, representing Vuosaari Golf Helsinki, has established a distinctive presence within the Hector Trophée, known affectionately by many as "Susi-Pasi." His reputation extends beyond the greens, sometimes drawing good-natured speculation about his true sporting allegiance, with whispers suggesting his passion for basketball might even eclipse that of fellow competitor Marcus, making some fans wonder about his dedication to golf.

Across his four appearances in this esteemed pair competition, Pasi has demonstrated a formidable ability to contend. His dedication culminated in a memorable triumph, as he successfully hoisted the coveted Hector Trophée on one occasion, a testament to his strategic play and effective partnership. While the individual Victor Trophy has yet to grace his mantel, his team success firmly places him among the tournament's distinguished champions.

As the Hector Trophée 2026 approaches, Pasi will regrettably not be among the competitors, marking a temporary pause in his participation. However, his continued engagement in other Hector events confirms his enduring connection to the community and the sport. His past victory and unique character ensure that Pasi, "Susi-Pasi," remains a highly regarded figure whose potential return to the Hector Trophée fairways would be eagerly anticipated.
